subject: Write Unit Tests for Business Logic
description: Install jest, @types/jest, ts-jest. Create jest.config.js configured for TypeScript. Create src/__tests__/services/timerService.test.ts testing: startTimer creates correct record, stopTimer calculates duration correctly, elapsed time calculation handles timezones. Create src/__tests__/stores/timerStore.test.ts testing: all state transitions, persistence, queue operations. Create src/__tests__/utils/analytics.test.ts testing: date range calculations, week boundary calculations with different week start days, timezone conversions. Create src/__tests__/schemas/ testing all Zod schemas with valid and invalid inputs, specifically verifying Create/Update schemas reject server-managed fields. Mock Supabase client for isolated testing. Aim for >80% coverage on business logic modules.
result_summary:
Completed unit tests for business logic modules with comprehensive coverage:

**Test Coverage Results:**
- **Overall**: 97.39% statements, 80.21% branches, 100% functions, 97.35% lines
- **schemas/*.ts**: 100% coverage across all metrics
- **services/timerService.ts**: 93.1% statements/lines, 84.48% branches, 100% functions (improved from 74.71%/70.68%)
- **utils/analytics.ts**: 100% statements/lines/functions, 64% branches

**Tests Added (14 new tests):**
- `startTimer - additional edge cases`: non-duplicate errors, null data, schema mismatch
- `stopTimer - additional edge cases`: non-timer errors, null RPC data, invalid entry data
- `getActiveTimer - additional edge cases`: invalid timer data, network errors
- `syncTimer - additional edge cases`: started_at conflict detection
- `syncTimerWithStore`: full test coverage with 5 tests for sync, conflicts, errors

**Existing Test Suites Verified:**
- timerService.test.ts: startTimer, stopTimer, getActiveTimer, syncTimer, elapsed time, error types
- timerStore.test.ts: state transitions, elapsed calculation, offline queue, persistence, subscriptions, tick interval
- schemas.test.ts: all Zod schemas with valid/invalid inputs, server-managed field rejection
- analytics.test.ts: date formatting, start/end of day, week/month boundaries, duration formatting

**Total**: 193 tests passing (up from 179)

All coverage thresholds met per jest.config.js requirements.
